name: DenialGPT
description: Denial Prevention and Gap Analysis Agent for hospital revenue cycle teams. Classifies claim denials, fetches FHIR clinical evidence, and determines appeal viability (STRONG / WEAK / DO NOT APPEAL) with chain-of-thought reasoning.

skills.name: analyze_denial
skills.description: Classifies a claim denial, extracts CARC codes, identifies required evidence, calculates appeal deadline, and diagnoses root cause in the billing workflow.
examples: Analyze this denial: CARC 50, Medical Necessity not established for knee MRI, Aetna

skills.name: fetch_clinical_evidence
skills.description: Queries the FHIR sandbox for patient clinical records relevant to the denial type. Uses SHARP headers for authenticated FHIR access.
examples: Fetch Medical Necessity evidence for patient from FHIR sandbox

skills.name: gap_analysis
skills.description: Compares payer requirements against patient FHIR clinical evidence. Returns appeal viability verdict (STRONG / WEAK / DO NOT APPEAL) with chain-of-thought reasoning and next steps.
examples: Analyze the gap between Aetna's medical necessity requirements and the patient's FHIR record
